name: Rogz Dog Utility Control Harness Small – Pink
shortDescription: Rogz Dog Utility Control Harness Small – Pink
description: Rogz Control Harness ensures comfort for your dog while providing you with additional control. With a padded chest plate for extra comfort and support, the pressure is transferred from your dog?s neck to its chest. Dual Lead/Leash attachment points: 1. Classic Lead/Leash attachment – Top of dog?s back for everyday use. 2. Multi Lead/Leash attachment ? Front chest pad for control and steering. TO FIT: There are multiple adjustment points to ensure you get the best fit for comfort and function. Once adjusted to size, there should be a two-finger gap between the harness and your dog?s body. Size: Small 11mm (Neck Size: 25 – 35cm)
